why_it_matters_en: With growing data volumes, improving query engine efficiency is critical. Leveraging NVIDIA hardware advances enables designing optimized GPU-accelerated query engines to significantly enhance processing speed and responsiveness.

title_zh: NVIDIA BioNeMo Agent 工具包在 Claude Science 中为生命科学研究人员带来加速的 AI
title_en: NVIDIA BioNeMo Agent Toolkit Brings Accelerated AI to Life Sciences Researchers in Claude Science
summary_zh: 生命科学已经进入计算规模时代，NVIDIA 过去十多年构建了完整的 GPU 加速计算栈，包括硬件、框架、库、模型、微服务和领域特定工具，帮助研究人员执行更复杂的工作流程并加快迭代速度。本周，Anthropic 宣布推出面向科学的 AI 工作台 Claude Science，集成了 NVIDIA 的 BioNeMo Agent 工具包，加速生命科学领域的 AI 研究。
summary_en: Life sciences has entered an era of computational scale, and for over a decade, NVIDIA has built a full GPU-accelerated computing stack—including hardware, frameworks, libraries, models, microservices, and domain-specific tools—to help researchers run sophisticated workflows and iterate faster. This week, Anthropic announced Claude Science, an AI workbench for science, integrating NVIDIA's BioNeMo Agent Toolkit to accelerate AI research in life sciences.
why_it_matters_zh: 该工具包结合了 NVIDIA 长期积累的 GPU 加速技术和 Anthropic 的 AI 工作台，显著提升了生命科学领域的计算能力和研究效率，促进科学发现。
why_it_matters_en: The toolkit combines NVIDIA's long-standing GPU acceleration expertise with Anthropic's AI workbench, significantly enhancing computational power and research efficiency in life sciences, thereby advancing scientific discovery.

title_zh: NVIDIA 推理软件栈如何实现最低令牌成本
title_en: How NVIDIA’s Inference Software Stack Powers the Lowest Token Cost
summary_zh: 随着组织从AI试点转向生产AI工厂，基础设施决策重点从芯片峰值规格转向每令牌成本：每美元、每瓦特以及在要求的延迟目标内能交付多少有用令牌。NVIDIA的推理软件栈与其GPU、CPU、网络及系统协同设计，并借助广泛的开源生态系统，优化了这一成本效益。
summary_en: As organizations transition from AI pilots to production AI factories, infrastructure decisions have shifted focus from peak chip specifications to cost per token—measuring how many useful tokens can be delivered per dollar, per watt, and within required latency targets. NVIDIA’s inference software stack, co-designed with its GPUs, CPUs, networking, and systems, and strengthened by a broad open source ecosystem, optimizes this cost efficiency.
why_it_matters_zh: 在生产级AI应用中，降低每令牌成本对于实现大规模经济性和性能至关重要。NVIDIA的软件与硬件紧密结合，及其开源生态系统的支持，使得用户能够在满足延迟要求的同时最大化令牌产出，确保整体AI推理的成本效益。
why_it_matters_en: Reducing cost per token is critical for achieving scalability and performance in production-grade AI applications. NVIDIA’s close integration of software with its hardware, along with strong open source ecosystem support, enables users to maximize token output while meeting latency requirements, ensuring overall cost efficiency in AI inference.

title_zh: 通过保留选择实现递归自我进化智能体
title_en: Recursive Self-Evolving Agents via Held-Out Selection
summary_zh: 本文提出了递归自我进化智能体（RSEA），该智能体能够通过递归重写其三层自然语言状态——命令策略、可复用技能和程序化操作手册——实现无权重更新的自我优化。RSEA仅在对独立保留数据集的性能不退化时，才接受新的候选改进，保证了进化过程的单调安全性。在多个基准测试（ALFWorld、GAIA、τ-bench和WebShop）及六个对比方法上评测结果显示，没有单一方法在所有任务中表现最优；RSEA在ALFWorld上表现最佳，并凭借严格保留选择实现了稳定且安全的递归自我进化。
summary_en: This paper introduces Recursive Self-Evolving Agent (RSEA), which recursively rewrites its compact three-layer natural-language state—including an imperative strategy, reusable skills, and a procedural playbook—without weight updates. RSEA commits candidate improvements only if they do not degrade performance on a held-out split, ensuring monotone safety. Evaluated on four diverse benchmarks and six baselines, results show no universal winner; RSEA achieves the best single-pass performance on ALFWorld and maintains safe, stable self-evolution through strict held-out selection.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究通过引入保留数据集上的严格选择机制，解决了智能体自我进化中的高方差和性能回退问题，提升了递归自我进化的稳定性和安全性。这为自然语言条件智能体持续改进提供了坚实的方法论基础，将推动智能体在复杂任务中的表现优化。
why_it_matters_en: The study addresses instability and performance regressions in agent self-evolution by applying a strict held-out selection mechanism, improving the stability and safety of recursive self-evolution. This provides a solid methodological foundation for continuous improvement of natural-language-conditioned agents, advancing their performance on complex tasks.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Recursive Self-Evolving Agents via Held-Out Selection. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 73.

title_zh: 通过伦理困境对大型语言模型进行亚里士多德美德画像
title_en: Aristotelian Virtue Profiling of LLMs through Ethical Dilemmas
summary_zh: 本文介绍了VirtueMap框架，使用亚里士多德美德伦理视角，评估大型语言模型（LLMs）在伦理困境中不同优先级的反应，如公平、诚实、勇气和节制。该方法不寻求单一正确答案，而是要求人类或LLMs对七个非致命、非政治、非宗教伦理困境中的五个回应进行排序，通过广泛数据验证形成基准排序，使用归一化Borda对齐计算实际智慧、正义、真实、勇气和节制的美德画像。研究对九个LLM家族进行了评估，发现排名一致性高达90.3%，主要差异体现在勇气、节制和正义上。与此同时，发布了一个互动网站，可在本地浏览器中计算并比较美德画像。
summary_en: This paper introduces VirtueMap, a framework leveraging Aristotelian virtue ethics to profile large language models (LLMs) through ethical dilemmas involving tradeoffs among virtues like fairness, honesty, courage, and temperance. Instead of seeking a single correct answer, it asks humans or LLMs to rank five responses across seven general, non-lethal, non-political, and non-religious dilemmas. After extensive human validation to establish reference orderings, normalized Borda alignment is used to score rankings and generate profiles over Practical Wisdom, Justice, Truthfulness, Courage, and Temperance. The study evaluated nine LLM families with high mean rank consistency (90.3%), noting the greatest differences in Courage, Temperance, and Justice. An interactive website allowing local profile computation and comparison is also released.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究创新性地通过亚里士多德美德伦理框架，为LLMs在复杂伦理决策中的行为提供多维度且可验证的评估标准，弥补了以往仅依赖单一正确答案的局限，促进了对模型伦理能力的深刻理解和比较。
why_it_matters_en: By applying an Aristotelian virtue ethics framework, this work innovatively offers a multidimensional and validated evaluation of LLMs’ responses in complex ethical scenarios, moving beyond single-correct-answer paradigms. It advances understanding and comparison of models’ ethical reasoning capabilities.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Aristotelian Virtue Profiling of LLMs through Ethical Dilemmas. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 低成本基于概念的局部解释：无训练方法能走多远？
title_en: Low-cost concept-based localized explanations: How far can we get with training-free approaches?
summary_zh: 本文评估了中等规模多模态大型语言模型（MLLM）在严格零-shot条件下对局部区域（物体及部件层面）进行概念命名的能力。通过提出可复现的零-shot概念命名评估协议，进行实验验证，模型在物体级别准确率达62%-88%，展示了无需训练即可进行局部概念注释的潜力。作者讨论了方法的局限与失败模式，并发布了支持未来低成本C-XAI研究的框架。
summary_en: This work evaluates mid-scale Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) in performing zero-shot localized concept naming at object and part levels without training. A reproducible zero-shot evaluation protocol for Concept Naming is proposed, involving category-constrained prompting and embedding-similarity strategies. Experiments show 62%-88% object-level exact-match accuracy, demonstrating the potential of training-free concept annotation from localized regions. Limitations and failure modes are discussed, and a framework is released to support future low-cost C-XAI research.
why_it_matters_zh: 本研究展示了无需训练即可实现局部区域概念注释的可行性，降低了C-XAI的成本和数据需求，有助于推动更广泛的解释性人工智能应用。
why_it_matters_en: This study demonstrates the feasibility of training-free localized concept annotation, reducing costs and data needs in C-XAI, which can advance wider adoption of explainable AI applications.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Low-cost concept-based localized explanations: How far can we get with training-free approaches?. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 76.

title_zh: 多模态大语言模型能像人类一样进行审美批评吗？评估开放式审美推理
title_en: Can MLLMs Critique Like Humans? Evaluating Open-Ended Aesthetic Reasoning in Multimodal Large Language Models
summary_zh: 本文探讨了多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在开放式审美批评中的表现。不同于多选题式的审美评测，开放式审美批评没有唯一正确答案，且现有评估多为数值分数，而非真实的文字批评。作者使用Reddit照片批评数据，基于多样化的人类排名批评参考，通过六种提示策略评测五种开源权重模型，包含对错误图像输入的对照。结果显示，基于参考的相似度指标存在偏差，严苛的词汇和学习度量与人类批评关联较弱，粗糙的嵌入余弦相似反映出模型更像是稳定的写作风格而非针对图像的观察。在行为特征上，模型输出文字量超出人类两到三倍，覆盖审美面向更广且深入，且在同一照片多次批评中重复内容，而人类则更具选择性和差异性。文章指出，现有相似度评测倾向奖励流畅且全面的批评风格，而非人类批评的选择性和针对性，讨论了对开放式多模态生成评估和训练的启示。
summary_en: This paper explores the performance of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in open-ended aesthetic critique. Unlike multiple-choice aesthetic benchmarks, open-ended critique lacks a single correct answer, and most evaluations have used numeric scores rather than authentic written critiques. Using the Reddit Photo Critique Dataset and multiple ranked human references, the study evaluates five open-weight MLLMs under six prompt conditions, including a control feeding incorrect images. Findings indicate reference-based similarity metrics are misleading: stricter lexical and learned metrics weakly align with human critiques, while coarse embedding similarity likely reflects a stable model writing style, not image-specific observation. Behaviorally, models produce two to three times more text than humans, cover nearly every aesthetic aspect in depth, and repeat content across critiques, unlike selective and varied human critiques. The work argues that current similarity-based evaluations favor fluent, comprehensive critique styles instead of humans' selective specificity, and discusses implications for evaluating and training open-ended multimodal generation.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究揭示了多模态大语言模型当前在开放式审美批评上的局限，尤其是评估指标未能准确反映模型与人类批评的差异，提示未来需要改进评测方法并指导模型训练以更贴近人类审美思维。
why_it_matters_en: This study reveals limitations of current multimodal large language models in open-ended aesthetic critique, highlighting that existing evaluation metrics fail to accurately capture differences from human critiques. It underscores the need for improved evaluation techniques and training approaches that better align models with human aesthetic reasoning.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Can MLLMs Critique Like Humans? Evaluating Open-Ended Aesthetic Reasoning in Multimodal Large Language Models. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 76.
